pi_items.source: Found in setup_task.sh where the CSV is generated and saved to this path.
Found in setup_task.sh where SampleDivesV2.ssrf is copied to this path and launched with subsurface.
setup_task.sh dynamically creates legacy_log.csv with exactly 3 dive entries.

The base file SampleDivesV2.ssrf downloaded from the Subsurface repository actually contains 29 dives (verified by counting <dive> tags). Appending 3 dives results in 32 total dives, contradicting the setup script comment that claimed '8 dives'.

privileged_info_summary: The legacy CSV file being imported is synthetically generated and contains exactly 3 dive records at /home/ga/Documents/legacy_log.csv. The target dive database is located at /home/ga/Documents/dives.ssrf. The metadata claims 11 total dives are expected post-import, but the base file (SampleDivesV2.ssrf from the official Subsurface repo) actually contains 29 dives, meaning the correct total expected dives is 32.
